prompt: I’m checking an exhibit caption for the Acorn Ecology Lab in Oakridge. Identify the organization responsible for the site, then use a primary record from that organization or the municipality to verify the year it first opened to the public. Treat search snippets only as leads and fetch the record before answering. This is fact-finding only: do not suggest contacting staff or changing a catalog record.

fetch_primary.title: Acorn Ecology Lab dedication register
fetch_primary.content: The official dedication register records that the Acorn Ecology Lab opened to the public on 17 May 2020. A separate entry records construction completion in 2019.
